name: codegraph_callees
description: Find all functions/methods that a specific symbol calls. Useful for understanding dependencies and code flow.

symbol.description: Name of the function, method, or class to find callees for

limit.description: Maximum number of callees to return (default: 20)

projectPath.description: Path to a different project with .codegraph/ initialized. If omitted, uses current project. Use this to query other codebases.
